title: 10 best herbal capsules for numbness in hands
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for numbness in hands are a natural remedy designed to alleviate tingling, burning, or prickling sensations in fingers and palms. These capsules contain a blend of herbs such as capsaicin, ginger, and turmeric that help improve blood circulation and reduce inflammation, thus alleviating numbness. For example, products like Capsaicin Cream Capsules and Herbal Numbness Relief Formula have shown to provide relief from hand numbness. By taking these capsules, individuals can experience improved dexterity, reduced discomfort during daily activities, and enhanced overall quality of life.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree capsules helps with numbness in hands because of its unique blend of nutrients and antioxidants that promote healthy blood circulation. The capsules contain compounds that help to improve nerve function, reducing numbness and tingling sensations in the hands. Additionally, they are rich in omega-3 fatty acids and other essential fatty acids that nourish the skin and underlying tissues, allowing for greater sensitivity and sensation.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Maidenhair tree capsules have anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce inflammation and swelling in the nerves, which can contribute to numbness or tingling sensations in the hands.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in maidenhair tree capsules help protect the nerves from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can also contribute to numbness and tingling sensations.

Neuroprotective properties: Maidenhair tree capsules contain neuroprotective compounds that may help protect the nerve cells from damage and degeneration, potentially relieving numbness and tingling sensations in the hands.
remedy_parts: Roots: Contains bioactive compounds that help alleviate numbness and tingling sensations by stimulating blood circulation and reducing inflammation.
Barks: Rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which have analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in relieving numbness and pain in the hands.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of dried ginkgo biloba leaves and grind them into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix the ground ginkgo biloba powder with 50 milliliters of distilled water in a saucepan and bring to a boil over medium heat.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the mixture for 20 minutes, allowing the herbs to steep and infuse their active compounds into the water.
Strain the infusion through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into a clean glass container, discarding the solids and retaining the liquid extract.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the ginkgo biloba liquid extract at a dosage of 250 milligrams per capsule and seal for later use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Brahmi capsules helps with numbness in hands because they contain a concentrated extract of Bacopa monnieri, an herb traditionally used to enhance cognitive function and improve memory. The active compounds in brahmi capsules have been shown to increase the production of neurotransmitters that stimulate nerve endings, reducing numbness and tingling sensations in the hands. Additionally, brahmi's antioxidant properties help protect nerves from damage caused by free radicals, promoting healthy nerve function and alleviating numbness and prickling sensations in the hands.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Brahmi capsules have anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce inflammation in the nerves, which can cause numbness in the hands, and alleviate associated pain.

Neuroprotective property: Brahmi's neuroprotective compounds help protect the nerve cells from damage and degeneration, which can contribute to numbness and tingling sensations in the hands, thereby promoting healthy nerve function.

Antioxidant property: Brahmi capsules contain antioxidants that neutralize free radicals and prevent oxidative stress, which can damage nerves and cause numbness, helping to maintain overall nerve health.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds, Brahmi roots are used to alleviate numbness in hands due to their ability to improve circulation and reduce inflammation.
Rhyzomes: With a high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids, Brahmi rhyzomes help to increase blood flow to the hands, reducing numbness and discomfort.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried bacopa monnieri leaves from a trusted source weighing exactly 100 grams.
Grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle taking 10 minutes.
Combine 50 grams of the powdered bacopa monnieri with 50 grams of potato starch and 10 grams of gelatin mixing well for 5 minutes.
Fill empty capsule shells with the mixture weighing approximately 500 milligrams per capsule using a spoon taking 15 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature away from direct sunlight for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules helps with numbness in hands because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The active compound curcumin, present in turmeric, has been shown to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress that can cause numbness or tingling sensations in the hands. By reducing swelling and repairing damaged tissue, turmeric capsules help restore normal nerve function, alleviating symptoms of numbness, tingling, and pain. This natural remedy provides a safe and effective way to address hand numbness, promoting overall well-being and quality of life.
remedy_properties: Curcumin's anti-inflammatory properties: Turmeric's active compound, curcumin, has potent anti-inflammatory effects that can help reduce inflammation and swelling in the nerves, which may be contributing to numbness in the hands.
Curcumin's antioxidant properties: Curcumin's antioxidant properties can help protect the nerves from oxidative damage and inflammation, which may be causing numbness in the hands.

Curcumin's neuroprotective effects: Turmeric's curcumin has been shown to have neuroprotective effects, which means it can help promote nerve health and function, potentially alleviating symptoms of numbness in the hands.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: The rhyzome is the thick, underground stem of the turmeric plant, which contains a high concentration of curcuminoids that help alleviate numbness and tingling sensations in the hands.

Roots: The roots of the turmeric plant are rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help reduce numbness and discomfort in the hands by promoting blood flow and reducing inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest curcuma longa roots extract 2-3 grams of fresh or dried root material from the curcuma longa plant.
Dry the root material grind the root material into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the curcuma longa powder with excipients prepare a mixture containing 250 milligrams of curcuma longa powder per capsule with excipients like lactose or starch.
Fill the capsules encapsulate the curcuma longa powder mixture into vegetarian capsules using an automatic capsule filler machine.
Package and store label the capsules in glass jars with tight-fitting lids and store them in a cool dry place for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: St John's wort capsules helps with numbness in hands because they contain hyperforin, a compound that has been shown to improve blood flow and oxygenation to peripheral nerves. This increased circulation can help alleviate numbness and tingling sensations caused by nerve damage or compression. Additionally, St John's wort's antioxidant properties may also help protect against oxidative stress, which can contribute to nerve dysfunction. By promoting healthy nerve function and circulation, St John's wort capsules may provide relief from numbness in the hands.
remedy_properties: Hyperforin: This bioactive compound has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help reduce numbness and tingling sensations in the hands by reducing inflammation and oxidative stress.

Hypotensive action: St. John's Wort capsules have been shown to improve blood circulation and lower blood pressure, which can help alleviate numbness and tingling sensations in the hands caused by poor blood flow.

Adaptogenic properties: St. John's Wort is considered an adaptogen, meaning it helps the body adapt to stress and promote balance. This property may help reduce anxiety and stress-related symptoms that can contribute to numbness and tingling sensations in the hands.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in hyperforin, a compound that helps to reduce nerve pain and inflammation, making it effective in relieving numbness in hands.
Rhyzomes: Contain flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate numbness and tingling sensations in the hands.
Barks: High in antioxidants and phenolic compounds, which can help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, leading to improved blood flow and reduced numbness in hands.
remedy_recipe: Harvest and clean hypericum perforatum dried leaves and stems weighing approximately one hundred grams.
Dry the harvested plant material using a food dehydrator or sun drying for eight hours.
Grind the dried plant material into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle for ten minutes.
Mix the ground plant material with 500 milligrams of gelatin powder in a small bowl for five minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the mixture and seal them immediately to preserve potency for thirty minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ashwagandha capsules helps with numbness in hands because they contain a unique blend of herbs that work together to reduce stress and anxiety, which are common causes of numbness in the hands. The herbal extract also has anti-inflammatory properties that help to calm the nervous system and promote circulation, thereby reducing tingling sensations and restoring sensation to the hands. remedy_properties: Adaptogenic property: Ashwagandha's adaptogenic property helps to reduce stress and anxiety, which are common underlying causes of numbness in hands, by regulating the body's response to stress and promoting relaxation.

Anti-inflammatory property: Ashwagandha's anti-inflammatory property helps to reduce inflammation and swelling in the hands, which can cause numbness and tingling sensations by reducing inflammation and promoting blood flow to the affected areas.

Antioxidant property: Ashwagandha's antioxidant property helps to protect cells from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to numbness and tingling sensations in the hands by neutralizing oxidative stress and promoting overall cellular health.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of ashwagandha are rich in bioactive compounds that help reduce numbness and tingling sensations in the hands by improving blood circulation and nerve function.
Barks: Ashwagandha bark contains anti-inflammatory compounds that can help alleviate numbness and pain in the hands by reducing inflammation and promoting healthy nerve endings.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality withania somnifera roots weighing 500 grams for proper dosage requirements.
Clean and cut the roots into small pieces then dry them using shade drying or air circulation method for two weeks.
Grind the dried root pieces into fine powder using a mortar and pestle taking approximately 30 minutes to complete.
Mix one part of the powder with three parts of pure gelatin capsule filler powder adding 10% glycerin as lubricant in a ratio of 1:100.
Fill the mixture into empty vegetable capsules using an encapsulating machine setting it to fill 500 capsules within 15 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Devil's claw capsules helps with numbness in hands because of its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce swelling and irritation in the nerves. The herb has been traditionally used to relieve pain and discomfort associated with arthritis and other inflammatory conditions, including numbness and tingling sensations in the fingers. By reducing inflammation and promoting healing, devil's claw capsules may help restore normal nerve function and alleviate numbness in the hands, allowing for improved sensation and mobility.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Devil's Claw capsules contain compounds that reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to numbness in the hands by decreasing pressure on nerves and promoting healthy blood flow.

Analgesic properties: The analgesic compounds found in Devil's Claw capsules help relieve pain and discomfort associated with numbness in the hands, making it easier for individuals to perform daily activities without feeling numb or tingling sensations.

Neuroprotective properties: Devil's Claw contains neuroprotective compounds that may help protect nerve fibers from damage, which can help alleviate numbness and tingling sensations in the hands by promoting healthy nerve function.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in alkaloids, particularly harpagosides and proanthocyanidins, which help relieve pain and inflammation associated with numbness.
Rhyzomes: Contain bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, making them effective in treating numbness and discomfort in the hands.
remedy_recipe: Source high-quality harpagophytum procumbens roots dried or fresh.
Measure out 100 grams of the herb and chop it into small pieces.
Mix the chopped herb with 500 milliliters of distilled water for 4 hours.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve to collect the extract.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 250-500 milligrams of the herbal extract per capsule.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Valerian capsules helps with numbness in hands because they contain a natural ingredient that has a sedative effect on the nervous system, which can help to reduce numbness and tingling sensations. The herb valerian root is known for its ability to calm the nerves and promote relaxation, making it an effective treatment for conditions such as peripheral neuropathy, which can cause numbness in the hands. Additionally, valerian capsules may help to improve blood flow to the extremities, further reducing numbness and discomfort.
remedy_properties: Sedative Properties: Valerian root's sedative properties can help to reduce inflammation and relax muscles, which can alleviate numbness and tingling sensations in the hands caused by conditions such as carpal tunnel syndrome.

Antioxidant Activity: The antioxidant compounds present in valerian capsules may help to protect nerves from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to numbness and weakness in the hands.

Nerve Stimulating Properties: Valerian root has been shown to stimulate nerve function and increase blood flow to the extremities, which can help to relieve numbness and tingling sensations in the hands.
remedy_parts: Roots: Valerian roots have been used for centuries to treat various health issues, including numbness and tingling sensations in the hands, due to their high concentration of bioactive compounds like valerenic acid.

Rhyzomes: The rhyzome of the valerian plant is a thick underground stem that contains a higher concentration of essential oils than roots, making it an effective ingredient for relieving numbness and tingling sensations in the hands.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried valeriana officinalis roots at a ratio of one part root to two parts leaf and chop them into small pieces.
Combine the chopped herbs with 60% ethanol for four hours and then filter out the solvent using cheesecloth and collect the extract.
Mix the extract with gelatin and water at a concentration of 500mg per capsule and fill 50-count capsules with the mixture.
Dehydrate the filled capsules in a low-temperature oven set at 150 degrees fahrenheit for two hours to harden the shells.
Store the finished capsules in an airtight container away from direct sunlight and moisture at room temperature for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginseng capsules helps with numbness in hands because they improve blood circulation and reduce inflammation. The herb has natural anti-inflammatory properties that help to alleviate compression on nerves, which can cause numbness, tingling, and pain in the hands and fingers. By increasing oxygen and nutrient delivery to the affected areas, ginseng capsules promote healthy nerve function and restore sensation to numb or prickly hands.
remedy_properties: Improves Blood Circulation: Ginseng capsules help increase blood flow to the extremities, including the hands, which can reduce numbness and tingling by increasing oxygen and nutrient delivery to the affected areas.

Reduces Inflammation: Ginseng has anti-inflammatory properties that may help alleviate numbness in the hands by reducing inflammation and swelling in the nerves and surrounding tissues, allowing for normal nerve function to resume.

Enhances Nerve Function: Ginseng contains compounds that have been shown to improve nerve conduction velocity and reduce symptoms of neuropathy, including numbness, tingling, and pain, by increasing the production of neurotransmitters and improving communication between nerve cells.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the ginseng plant are rich in bioactive compounds that help to improve circulation and relieve numbness in hands, making them an effective ingredient for medicinal capsules.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzome is a modified stem that grows underground and contains high levels of saponins, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help to reduce numbness in the hands.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried panax ginseng roots weighing 10-15 grams and clean them thoroughly.
Grind the cleaned ginseng roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 5 minutes.
Mix the ground ginseng powder with 200ml of boiling water to create a decoction and steep for 30 minutes.
Filter the decoction through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a bowl and let it cool completely taking 1 hour.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 500mg of the cooled ginseng decoction mixture and seal tightly using a capsule filler machine.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Hawthorn capsules helps with numbness in hands because of their ability to improve blood circulation and reduce inflammation. The berries, leaves, and flowers of the hawthorn plant contain bioactive compounds that help to dilate blood vessels, allowing more oxygen and nutrients to reach the extremities, including the hands. remedy_properties: Oleic acid: Hawthorn capsules contain oleic acid, which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, helping to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress that may contribute to numbness in the hands.

Quercetin: Quercetin is a flavonoid compound present in hawthorn that acts as a potent anti-inflammatory agent, reducing swelling and pain associated with numbness and tingling sensations in the hands.

Flavonoids: The flavonoid content in hawthorn capsules has vasodilatory properties, which can help improve blood flow to the extremities, including the hands, potentially alleviating numbness caused by reduced circulation.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds that help alleviate numbness and tingling sensations in the hands by stimulating blood flow and nerve function.
Barks: Containing flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce numbness and pain in the hands.
remedy_recipe: Harvest crataegus monogyna leaves and flowers at dawn when dew is still present to ensure maximum potency.
Dry the plant material using a food dehydrator or sun drying method for 24 hours to preserve bioactive compounds.
Grind dried crataegus monogyna into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle, taking care not to generate excessive heat.
Mix the powdered herbal extract with a binder such as silica gel in a ratio of 1:2 to improve capsule filling efficiency, followed by gentle blending for 5 minutes.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with approximately 250mg of the powdered herbal blend, ensuring correct dosage and preparing for packaging or storage purposes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maypop capsules helps with numbness in hands because they contain Passiflora incarnata, a natural herb that has been traditionally used to treat various neurological disorders. The active compounds in maypop, such as flavonoids and alkaloids, have been shown to increase the production of neurotransmitters like serotonin and GABA, which help regulate nerve function and relieve numbness and tingling sensations. This property helps to decrease swelling and pressure on nerves, relieving numbness and tingling sensations.

Antioxidant: The antioxidants present in Maypop capsules help protect the body from free radical damage, which can contribute to numbness in hands caused by oxidative stress. By neutralizing free radicals, these antioxidants may reduce inflammation and promote healthy nerve function.

Nerve-protecting flavonoids: Maypop capsules contain flavonoids that have been shown to have neuroprotective properties, which can help preserve the integrity of nerve cells and fibers. This property may contribute to the relief of numbness in hands by reducing oxidative stress and inflammation that can damage nerves.

Rhyzomes: The thick, underground rhyzomes of the maypop plant contain compounds that have been shown to have analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in reducing numbness and pain in the hands.
remedy_recipe: Gather dried passionflower flowers and herbs from a reputable supplier or harvest yourself according to local regulations.
Grind 10 grams of the dried material into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle for about 5 minutes.
Sift the powdered mixture through a fine-mesh sieve to remove any lumps or large particles for about 3 minutes.
Mix 1 teaspoon of the sifted powder with 500ml of boiling water in a glass jar, allowing it to steep for 10-15 minutes to create an herbal infusion.
Strain the infusion through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into another container and fill gelatin capsules with the filtered liquid using a dropper or spoon for about 2 hours.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat numbness in hands with herbal capsules is by taking a combination of Ashwagandha, Ginkgo Biloba, and St. John's Wort. These herbs help improve blood circulation, reduce inflammation, and stimulate nerve regeneration. Additionally, Omega-3 fatty acid-rich capsules from flaxseed or fish oil can also be taken to reduce inflammation and promote healthy nerve function. It is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before starting any new supplements.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to numbness in hands that are treated with herbal capsules are carpal tunnel syndrome, Raynaud's disease, and peripheral neuropathy. These conditions cause tingling, weakness, or loss of sensation in the fingers and hands. Herbal capsules containing ingredients like Ashwagandha, Ginkgo Biloba, and Turmeric have anti-inflammatory properties that help alleviate symptoms by improving blood circulation, reducing inflammation, and soothing nerve damage.
